name: cumulonimbus
description: A multiplayer options replay and learning cockpit with per-user model training and Tradier sandbox-first broker integration.

scripts.dev:pages: npm run build && wrangler pages dev public --port 8787
scripts.migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute aetherforge-db --local --file migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute aetherforge-db --local --file migrations/0002_research.sql && wrangler d1 execute aetherforge-db --local --file migrations/0003_model_forge.sql
scripts.migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute aetherforge-db --remote --file migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute aetherforge-db --remote --file migrations/0002_research.sql && wrangler d1 execute aetherforge-db --remote --file migrations/0003_model_forge.sql
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy public --project-name aetherforge
